database.name: DNDA
database.type: Oracle - Oracle Database 19c Enterprise Edition Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production Version 19.18.0.0.0

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL AND PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL) OR (STAFF_ID IS NULL AND PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: ADDRESS_ASSESSMENT_STAFF_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (TEAM_ID IS NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: ADDRESS_ASSESSMENT_TEAM_XOR
AP_REF_CUS_INSTITUTION

checkConstraint.constraint: (REFERRAL_GROUP_ID IS NULL AND APPROVED_PREMISES_ID IS NOT NULL) OR (REFERRAL_GROUP_ID IS NOT NULL AND APPROVED_PREMISES_ID IS NULL) OR (REFERRAL_GROUP_ID IS NOT NULL AND APPROVED_PREMISES_ID IS NOT NULL)
checkConstraint.name: APPROVED_PREMISES_REFERRAL_TYP

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (TEAM_ID IS NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: ASSESSMENT_TEAM_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL AND PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL) OR (STAFF_ID IS NULL AND PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: ASSESSMENT_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (EVENT_ID IS NOT NULL AND RQMNT_ID IS NULL AND LIC_CONDITION_ID IS NULL AND NSI_ID IS NULL AND PSS_RQMNT_ID IS NULL) OR (EVENT_ID IS NOT NULL AND RQMNT_ID IS NOT NULL AND LIC_CONDITION_ID IS NULL AND NSI_ID IS NULL AND PSS_RQMNT_ID IS NULL) OR (EVENT_ID IS NOT NULL AND RQMNT_ID IS NULL AND LIC_CONDITION_ID IS NOT NULL AND NSI_ID IS NULL AND PSS_RQMNT_ID IS NULL) OR (EVENT_ID IS NOT NULL AND RQMNT_ID IS NULL AND LIC_CONDITION_ID IS NULL AND NSI_ID IS NOT NULL AND PSS_RQMNT_ID IS NULL) OR (EVENT_ID IS NOT NULL AND RQMNT_ID IS NULL AND LIC_CONDITION_ID IS NULL AND NSI_ID IS NULL AND PSS_RQMNT_ID IS NOT NULL) OR (EVENT_ID IS NULL AND RQMNT_ID IS NULL AND LIC_CONDITION_ID IS NULL AND NSI_ID IS NOT NULL AND PSS_RQMNT_ID IS NULL ) OR (EVENT_ID IS NULL AND RQMNT_ID IS NULL AND LIC_CONDITION_ID IS NULL AND NSI_ID IS NULL AND PSS_RQMNT_ID IS NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: CONTACT_TYPE

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (TEAM_ID IS NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: OFFENDER_MANAGER_TEAM_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND STAFF_ID IS NULL) OR (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL AND STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_OR_STAFF

checkConstraint.constraint: (ACTIVE_FLAG = 0 AND TERMINATION_DATE IS NOT NULL) OR (ACTIVE_FLAG = 1 AND TERMINATION_DATE IS NULL)
checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_TERMINATION_DATE

table.name: DMS_BATCH
table.remarks: DMS_BATCH ======== This table stores the batch identifiers and the start, end and status of the folder and document creation

column.name: FOLDER_CREATE_START
column.remarks: Start of the folder creation for the batch

column.name: FOLDER_CREATE_FINISH
column.remarks: Finish of the folder creation for the batch

column.name: FOLDER_CREATE_STATUS_ID
column.remarks: Status of the folder creation process

column.name: DOCUMENT_CREATE_START
column.remarks: Start of the document creation for the batch

column.name: DOCUMENT_CREATE_FINISH
column.remarks: Finish of the document creation process for the batch

column.name: DOCUMENT_CREATE_STATUS_ID
column.remarks: Status of the document creation process

column.name: LAST_UPDATED_DATETIME
column.remarks: Last update date for the row

column.name: LAST_UPDATED_USER
column.remarks: Last update user for the row

table.name: DMS_DETAILED_DOCUMENT_STATUS
table.viewSql: SELECT db.dms_batch_id, db.batch_name, ds.dms_status_description, MIN(document_create_start) start_time, MAX(document_create_finish) finish_time, EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM (MAX(document_create_finish) - MIN(document_create_start))) * 60 + EXTRACT(SECOND FROM (MAX(document_create_finish) - MIN(document_create_start))) tot_time_seconds, COUNT(CASE WHEN dd.dms_document_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) TotalDocuments, COUNT(CASE WHEN dd.document_create_status_id = 5 THEN 1 END) Completed, COUNT(CASE WHEN dd.document_create_status_id = 4 THEN 1 END) CompletedwithError, COUNT(CASE WHEN dd.document_create_status_id IN (1,3) THEN 1 END) Pending FROM dms_batch db INNER JOIN dms_status ds ON db.document_create_status_id = ds.dms_status_id INNER JOIN dms_offender do ON db.dms_batch_id = do.dms_batch_id LEFT OUTER JOIN dms_document dd ON do.dms_offender_id = dd.dms_offender_id GROUP BY db.dms_batch_id, db.batch_name, ds.dms_status_description ORDER BY db.dms_batch_id

table.name: DMS_DETAILED_FOLDER_STATUS
table.viewSql: SELECT do.dms_batch_id, db.batch_name, ds.dms_status_description, MIN(folder_create_start) start_time, MAX(folder_create_finish) end_time, EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM (MAX(folder_create_finish) - MIN(folder_create_start))) * 60 + EXTRACT(SECOND FROM (MAX(folder_create_finish) - MIN(folder_create_start))) tot_time_seconds, COUNT(CASE WHEN do.offender_active_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 END) Active, COUNT(CASE WHEN do.offender_active_flag = 'N' THEN 1 END) Inactive, COUNT(CASE WHEN do.folder_create_status_id = 5 THEN 1 END) Completed, COUNT(CASE WHEN do.folder_create_status_id = 4 THEN 1 END) CompletedwithError, COUNT(CASE WHEN do.folder_create_status_id IN(1,3) THEN 1 END) Pending FROM dms_offender do INNER JOIN dms_batch db ON do.dms_batch_id = db.dms_batch_id INNER JOIN dms_status ds ON db.folder_create_status_id = ds.dms_status_id GROUP BY do.dms_batch_id, db.batch_name, ds.dms_status_description ORDER BY do.dms_batch_id

table.name: DMS_DETAILED_VALIDATION
table.viewSql: WITH dms_validation_agg AS ( SELECT dms_offender_id, SUM(ndelius_flag) ndelius, SUM(alfresco_flag) alfresco FROM dms_validation GROUP BY dms_offender_id) SELECT do.dms_batch_id, db.batch_name, COUNT(CASE WHEN do.search_return IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) Validated, COUNT(CASE WHEN do.search_return IS NULL THEN 1 END) Unvalidated, NVL(SUM(dvg.ndelius),0) invalid_ndelius, NVL(SUM(dvg.alfresco),0) invalid_alfresco FROM dms_offender do INNER JOIN dms_batch db ON do.dms_batch_id = db.dms_batch_id INNER JOIN dms_status ds ON db.folder_create_status_id = ds.dms_status_id LEFT OUTER JOIN dms_validation_agg dvg ON dvg.dms_offender_id = do.dms_offender_id GROUP BY do.dms_batch_id, db.batch_name ORDER BY do.dms_batch_id

table.name: DMS_DOCUMENT
table.remarks: DMS_DOCUMENT ========== This table stores the documents associated to an offender and the status of the migration

column.name: SOURCE_TABLE_KEY
column.remarks: Link to primary key of source table

column.name: DOCUMENT_LOCKED
column.remarks: Flag to indicate locked status of document

column.name: DOCUMENT_CHECKED_OUT
column.remarks: Flag to indicate checked out status of document

column.name: API_RESPONSE
column.remarks: The respose from the call to the Alfresco API when uploading the document

column.name: API_RETURN
column.remarks: The return payload from the Alfresco API when uploading the document

table.name: DMS_DOCUMENT_VALIDATION
table.viewSql: SELECT o.crn, id, name, locked, reserved, CASE WHEN ndelius_flag > 0 THEN 'NDELIUS' ELSE 'ALFRESCO' END location, GREATEST(ndelius_flag, alfresco_flag) instances, alfresco_document_count FROM dms_validation dv INNER JOIN dms_offender do ON dv.dms_offender_id = do.dms_offender_id INNER JOIN offender o ON do.offender_id = o.offender_id

table.name: DMS_MESSAGE_LOG
table.remarks: DMS_MESSAGE_LOG ============ The table which holds the logging information for DMS

table.name: DMS_OFFENDER
table.remarks: DMS_OFFENDER ========== This table holds the offenders associated to a batch and the status of the folder creation

column.name: OFFENDER_ACTIVE_FLAG
column.remarks: Flag indicating of current active offender

column.name: FOLDER_CREATED
column.remarks: Flag to indicate presence of folder

column.name: FOLDER_CREATE_STATUS_ID
column.remarks: Status of the folder creation for the offender

column.name: API_RESPONSE
column.remarks: The response received from the call to the Alfresco API to create the folder

column.name: API_RETURN
column.remarks: The returnpayload from the call to the Alfresco API when creating the folder

column.name: SEARCH_RETURN
column.remarks: The return payload from the Alfresco API for a search against the CRN for this offender row

column.name: ALFRESCO_DOCUMENT_COUNT
column.remarks: The count of documents based on the search return

column.name: LAST_SEARCH_DATETIME
column.remarks: The date and time of the last search request

table.name: DMS_OFFENDER_COHORT
table.viewSql: SELECT offender.offender_id, crn, probation_area.probation_area_id, probation_area.code, CASE current_disposal WHEN 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END offender_active_flag FROM offender INNER JOIN offender_manager ON offender.offender_id = offender_manager.offender_id AND active_flag = 1 INNER JOIN probation_area ON offender_manager.probation_area_id = probation_area.probation_area_id

table.name: DMS_SUMMARY_DOCUMENT_STATUS
table.viewSql: SELECT ds.dms_status_description document_creation_status, MIN(start_time) migration_start, MAX(finish_time) migration_end, SUM(TotalDocuments) Total, SUM(Completed) Completed, SUM(CompletedwithError) CompletedwithError, SUM(Pending) Pending, EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM (MAX(finish_time) - MIN(start_time))) * 60 + EXTRACT(SECOND FROM (MAX(finish_time) - MIN(start_time))) tot_time_seconds FROM dms_detailed_document_status dms INNER JOIN dms_batch db ON dms.dms_batch_id = db.dms_batch_id INNER JOIN dms_status ds ON db.document_create_status_id = ds.dms_status_id GROUP BY ds.dms_status_description

table.name: DMS_SUMMARY_FOLDER_STATUS
table.viewSql: SELECT ds.dms_status_description folder_creation_status, MIN(start_time) migration_start, MAX(end_time) migration_end, SUM(Active) + SUM(Inactive) Total, SUM(Completed) Completed, SUM(CompletedwithError) CompletedwithError, SUM(Pending) Pending, EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM (MAX(end_time) - MIN(start_time))) * 60 + EXTRACT(SECOND FROM (MAX(end_time) - MIN(start_time))) tot_time_seconds FROM dms_detailed_folder_status dms INNER JOIN dms_batch db ON dms.dms_batch_id = db.dms_batch_id INNER JOIN dms_status ds ON db.folder_create_status_id = ds.dms_status_id GROUP BY ds.dms_status_description

table.name: DMS_VALIDATION
table.remarks: DMS_VALIDATION ========== This table holds the document discrepanies from a validation run

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (TEAM_ID IS NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: OFFENDER_MANAGER_TEAM_XOR1

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND STAFF_ID IS NULL) OR (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL AND STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_OR_STAFF1

checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_TERMINATION_DATE1

checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_END_DATE3

checkConstraint.name: LIC_COND_TRANS_REC_TEAM_XOR

checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_ACTUAL_E_385237158

checkConstraint.constraint: (ACTIVE_FLAG = 0 AND END_DATE IS NOT NULL) OR (ACTIVE_FLAG = 1 AND END_DATE IS NULL)
checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_END_DATE_238841213

checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_END_DATE4

checkConstraint.name: OFFENDER_MANAGER_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (ORIGIN_STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL AND ORIGIN_PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL) OR (ORIGIN_STAFF_ID IS NULL AND ORIGIN_PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL) )

checkConstraint.name: OFFENDER_TRANS_ORGIN_TEAM_XOR

checkConstraint.name: OFFENDER_TRANS_REC_STAFF_XOR

checkConstraint.name: OFFENDER_TRANS_REC_TEAM_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: (ACTIVE_FLAG = 0 AND END_DATE IS NOT NULL) OR (ACTIVE_FLAG = 1 AND END_DATE IS NULL)
checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_END_DATE

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (ALLOCATION_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (ALLOCATION_TEAM_ID IS NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: ORDER_MANAGER_TEAM_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND ALLOCATION_STAFF_ID IS NULL) OR (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL AND ALLOCATION_STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: ORDER_MANAGER_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (ORIGIN_STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL AND ORIGIN_PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL) OR (ORIGIN_STAFF_ID IS NULL AND ORIGIN_PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: ORDER_TRANS_ORGIN_STAFF_XOR

checkConstraint.name: ORDER_TRANS_ORGIN_TEAM_XOR

checkConstraint.name: ORDER_TRANS_REC_STAFF_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (RECEIVING_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND RECEIVING_PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (RECEIVING_TEAM_ID IS NULL AND RECEIVING_PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: ORDER_TRANS_REC_TEAM_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: (ACTIVE_FLAG = 0 AND END_DATE IS NOT NULL) OR (ACTIVE_FLAG = 1 AND END_DATE IS NULL)
checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_END_DAT_1597930852

checkConstraint.constraint: (ACTIVE_FLAG = 0 AND END_DATE IS NOT NULL) OR (ACTIVE_FLAG = 1 AND END_DATE IS NULL)
checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_END_DATE_15186317

checkConstraint.constraint: (PRIVATE = 0 AND DIVISION_ID IS NULL) OR (PRIVATE = 1 AND DIVISION_ID IS NOT NULL)
checkConstraint.name: PRIVATE_DIVISION_ID_1805490531

checkConstraint.constraint: ( ( RQMNT_TYPE_MAIN_CATEGORY_ID IS NOT NULL AND AD_RQMNT_TYPE_MAIN_CATEGORY_ID IS NULL AND AD_RQMNT_TYPE_SUB_CATEGORY_ID IS NULL ) OR ( AD_RQMNT_TYPE_MAIN_CATEGORY_ID IS NOT NULL AND RQMNT_TYPE_MAIN_CATEGORY_ID IS NULL AND RQMNT_TYPE_SUB_CATEGORY_ID IS NULL ) )
checkConstraint.name: PROPOSED_RQMNT_TYPE

checkConstraint.constraint: (ACTIVE_FLAG = 0 AND TERMINATION_DATE IS NOT NULL) OR (ACTIVE_FLAG = 1 AND TERMINATION_DATE IS NULL)
checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_TERMINA_1282482389

checkConstraint.constraint: (ACTIVE_FLAG = 0 AND END_DATE IS NOT NULL) OR (ACTIVE_FLAG = 1 AND END_DATE IS NULL)
checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_END_DAT_1299265494

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (REF_TO_PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND REF_TO_STAFF_ID IS NULL) OR (REF_TO_PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL AND REF_TO_STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: REFERRAL_STAFF_XOR_PROVIDER_EM

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (REF_TO_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND REF_TO_PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (REF_TO_TEAM_ID IS NULL AND REF_TO_PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: REFERRAL_TEAM_XOR_PROVIDER_TEA

checkConstraint.constraint: (ACTIVE_FLAG = 0 AND END_DATE IS NOT NULL) OR (ACTIVE_FLAG = 1 AND END_DATE IS NULL)
checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_END_DATE1

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (COURT_REPORT_ID IS NOT NULL AND INSTITUTIONAL_REPORT_ID IS NULL) OR (COURT_REPORT_ID IS NULL AND INSTITUTIONAL_REPORT_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: REPORT_MANAGER_REPORT_TYPE

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (TEAM_ID IS NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: REPORT_MANAGER_TEAM_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND STAFF_ID IS NULL) OR (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL AND STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: REPORT_MANAGER_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: (ACTIVE_FLAG = 0 AND TERMINATION_DATE IS NOT NULL) OR (ACTIVE_FLAG = 1 AND TERMINATION_DATE IS NULL)
checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_TERMINATION_DATE2

checkConstraint.constraint: (RQMNT_TYPE_MAIN_CATEGORY_ID IS NULL AND RQMNT_TYPE_SUB_CATEGORY_ID IS NULL AND AD_RQMNT_TYPE_MAIN_CATEGORY_ID IS NOT NULL) OR (AD_RQMNT_TYPE_MAIN_CATEGORY_ID IS NULL AND AD_RQMNT_TYPE_SUB_CATEGORY_ID IS NULL AND RQMNT_TYPE_MAIN_CATEGORY_ID IS NOT NULL)
checkConstraint.name: REQUIREMENT_TYPE

checkConstraint.constraint: (ACTIVE_FLAG = 0 AND END_DATE IS NOT NULL) OR (ACTIVE_FLAG = 1 AND END_DATE IS NULL)
checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_END_DATE2

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND ALLOCATED_STAFF_ID IS NULL) OR (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL AND ALLOCATED_STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: ALLOCATED_MANAGER_STAFF_XOR_PR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (ALLOCATED_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (ALLOCATED_TEAM_ID IS NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: ALLOCATED_MANAGER_TEAM_XOR_PRO

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (ORIGIN_STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL AND ORIGIN_PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL) OR (ORIGIN_STAFF_ID IS NULL AND ORIGIN_PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: RQMNT_TRANS_ORGIN_STAFF_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (ORIGIN_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND ORIGIN_PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (ORIGIN_TEAM_ID IS NULL AND ORIGIN_PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: RQMNT_TRANS_ORGIN_TEAM_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (RECEIVING_STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL AND RECEIVING_PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL) OR (RECEIVING_STAFF_ID IS NULL AND RECEIVING_PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: RQMNT_TRANS_REC_STAFF_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (RECEIVING_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND RECEIVING_PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (RECEIVING_TEAM_ID IS NULL AND RECEIVING_PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: RQMNT_TRANS_REC_TEAM_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: (ACTIVE_FLAG = 0 AND END_DATE IS NOT NULL) OR (ACTIVE_FLAG = 1 AND END_DATE IS NULL)
checkConstraint.name: ACTIVE_FLAG_END_DATE_121858971

table.name: SPG_DOCUMENT

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (TEAM_ID IS NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: OFFENDER_MANAGER_TEAM_XOR2

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND STAFF_ID IS NULL) OR (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL AND STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_OR_STAFF2

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (TEAM_ID IS NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: OFFENDER_MANAGER_TEAM_XOR3

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL AND STAFF_ID IS NULL) OR (PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NULL AND STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: PROVIDER_EMPLOYEE_OR_STAFF3

checkConstraint.constraint: ( (TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (TEAM_ID IS NULL AND PROVIDER_TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )
checkConstraint.name: UPW_PROJECT_TEAM_XOR

checkConstraint.constraint: (SPACES_AVAILABLE >= MAXIMUM_NUMBER) OR (SPACES_AVAILABLE IS NULL) OR (MAXIMUM_NUMBER IS NULL)
checkConstraint.name: SPACES_AVAILABLE_MAXI_47647470

table.name: V_CONTACT_ES
table.viewSql:
SELECT c.offender_id, c.contact_id, c.contact_date, c.contact_start_time, c.contact_end_time, c.contact_type_id, c.contact_outcome_type_id, c.latest_enforcement_action_id, -- c.event_id, e.event_number, e.active_flag event_active, e.referral_date, d.termination_date, c.rqmnt_id, c.nsi_id, c.lic_condition_id, c.pss_rqmnt_id, c.rar_activity, c.nomis_case_note_id, -- c.document_linked, c.table_name, c.primary_key_id, -- c.provider_location_id, c.provider_employee_id, c.office_location_id, -- c.attended, c.complied, c.hours_credited, c.visor_contact, c.sensitive, c.alert_active, c.explanation_id, c.enforcement, -- c.staff_id, c.team_id, -- c.notes, c.description, -- c.soft_deleted, c.created_datetime, c.last_updated_datetime, c.row_version,
JSON_OBJECT ( 'index' VALUE JSON_OBJECT ( '_index' VALUE 'contact_v1', '_id' VALUE '000'||c.contact_id /* ,'routing' value c.offender_id */ , 'version' value '000'||ora_rowscn, 'version_type' value 'external') ) jheader, JSON_OBJECT ( 'OFFENDER_ID' VALUE c.offender_id, 'CRN' value o.crn, -- 'OFFENDER' VALUE -- o.crn || ' ' -- || o.surname || ' ' -- || o.first_name || ' ' -- || o.second_name || ' ' -- || o.third_name ||' ' -- || substr(o.first_name,1,1)||substr(o.surname,1,1), -- Initial -- -- 'EVENT_NUMBER' VALUE e.event_number , -- 'EVENT_ACTIVE' VALUE decode(e.active_flag, NULL, NULL, 'ACTIVE'), -- 'REFERRAL_DATE' VALUE trunc(e.referral_date), -- 'REFERRAL_DATE_X' VALUE to_char(e.referral_date,'dd.mm.yyyy'), -- 'EVENT' VALUE TRIM( e.event_number || ' ' -- || decode (e.active_flag,NULL,'INACTIVE','ACTIVE') ||' Referral:'||to_char(e.referral_date,'dd.mm.yyyy')), -- 'DISPOSAL_DATE' VALUE trunc(d.disposal_date) , -- 'DISPOSAL_DATE_X' VALUE to_char(d.disposal_date,'dd.mm.yyyy') , -- 'TERMINATION_DATE' VALUE trunc(d.termination_date), -- 'TERMINATION_DATE_X' VALUE to_char(d.termination_date,'dd.mm.yyyy'), 'CONTACT_ID' VALUE c.contact_id , 'CONTACT_DATE' VALUE trunc(c.contact_date) , -- 'CONTACT_DATE_X' VALUE to_char(c.contact_date,'dd.mm.yyyy') , -- 'CONTACT_TYPE_ID' VALUE c.contact_type_id , -- 'CONTACT_OUTCOME_ID' VALUE c. contact_outcome_type_id, 'NOTES' VALUE c.notes,
'CONTACT_TYPE' VALUE null, 'CONTACT_TYPE_CODE' value rct.code, 'CONTACT_TYPE_DESCRIPTION' value rct.description, 'CONTACT_TYPE_SHORT_DESCRIPTION' value rct.short_description, -- 'TEAM' VALUE t.code -- || ' ' -- || t.description, -- 'STAFF' VALUE TRIM( s.officer_code -- || ' ' ||s.surname -- || ' ' ||decode(s.forename, NULL, ' ', s.forename) -- ||' ' ||substr(s.forename,1,1)||substr(s.surname,1,1)), -- 'PROBATION_AREA' VALUE pa.code || ' '|| pa.description, -- 'NSI' VALUE TRIM ( rnsit.code|| ' ' || rnsit.description ||' Referral:'|| to_char(nsi.referral_date,'dd.mm.yy')||' '|| rnsis.code ||' '||rnsis.description), -- 'RQMNT' VALUE rqmc.description||' '||to_char(nvl(rqmnt.start_date, rqmnt.commencement_date),'dd.mm.yy'), -- 'PSS' VALUE pss_rqmc.description||' '||to_char(nvl(pss_rqmnt.imposed_date, pss_rqmnt.commencement_date),'dd.mm.yy'), -- 'LIC_CONDITION' VALUE rtrim(rtrim(TRIM (rlct.code||' '||rlct.description||' Start:'||to_char(lc.start_date,'dd.mm.yy')||' End:'||to_char(lc.termination_date,'dd.mm.yy')),' End:'),' Start:'), 'LAST_UPDATED_DATE_TIME' VALUE C.last_updated_datetime, 'ROW_VERSION' VALUE C.row_version, 'CONTACT_DESCRIPTION' value c.description, 'CONTACT_OUTCOME' value NULL, 'CONTACT_OUTCOME_DESCRIPTION' value cot.description, 'CONTACT_ATTENDED' value decode(c.attended, 'Y', 'attended','N','fta' ,null), 'CONTACT_COMPLIED' value decode(c.complied, 'Y', 'complied','N','ftc',null),
-- 'SENSITIVE' value c.sensitive, 'YESTERDAY' value case WHEN lower(TO_CHAR(regexp_substr(c.notes,'YESTERDAY',1,1,'im'))) = LOWER('YESTERDAY') then to_char(c.contact_date -1,'dd-mm-yyyy') ELSE NULL end, 'TOMORROW' value case WHEN lower(TO_CHAR(regexp_substr(c.notes,'TOMORROW',1,1,'im'))) = LOWER('TOMORROW') then to_char(c.contact_date + 1,'dd-mm-yyyy') ELSE NULL end, 'SCN' value ora_rowscn
ABSENT ON NULL RETURNING CLOB ) jcontact, ora_rowscn scn FROM contact c JOIN offender o ON o.offender_id = c.offender_id LEFT OUTER JOIN event e ON e.event_id = c.event_id AND e.soft_deleted = 0 LEFT OUTER JOIN disposal d ON e.event_id = d.event_id AND d.soft_deleted = 0 LEFT OUTER JOIN team t ON c.team_id = t.team_id LEFT OUTER JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id = s.staff_id LEFT OUTER JOIN probation_area pa ON pa.probation_area_id = c.probation_area_id LEFT OUTER JOIN r_contact_type rct ON rct.contact_type_id = c.contact_type_id LEFT OUTER JOIN nsi ON c.nsi_id = nsi.nsi_id and nsi.soft_deleted = 0 LEFT OUTER JOIN r_nsi_type rnsit ON rnsit.nsi_type_id = nsi.nsi_type_id LEFT OUTER JOIN r_nsi_status rnsis ON rnsis.nsi_status_id = nsi.nsi_status_id LEFT OUTER JOIN lic_condition lc ON c.lic_condition_id = lc.lic_condition_id and lc.soft_deleted = 0 LEFT OUTER JOIN r_lic_cond_type_main_cat rlct ON rlct.lic_cond_type_main_cat_id = lc.lic_cond_type_main_cat_id left outer join rqmnt on c.rqmnt_id = rqmnt.rqmnt_id and rqmnt.soft_deleted = 0 left outer join r_rqmnt_type_main_category rqmc on rqmc.rqmnt_type_main_category_id = rqmnt.rqmnt_type_main_category_id left outer join pss_rqmnt on c.pss_rqmnt_id = pss_rqmnt.pss_rqmnt_id and pss_rqmnt.soft_deleted = 0 left outer join r_pss_rqmnt_type_main_category pss_rqmc on pss_rqmc.pss_rqmnt_type_main_cat_id = pss_rqmnt.pss_rqmnt_type_main_cat_id left outer join r_contact_outcome_type cot on cot.contact_outcome_type_id = c.contact_outcome_type_ID WHERE c.soft_deleted = 0

table.name: V_ND_PDM_VERSION
table.viewSql: SELECT '28.25' version, 'David Reid' PDM_designer FROM DUAL
